lines.tx: TRANSLATE: If you're fighting cancer just like me,
TRANSLATE: this song is for you.
TRANSLATE: I'm Maja and this is my third relapse
TRANSLATE: and I have every reason to diss you.
TRANSLATE: So what do you say, Maja? Let's go at him!
TRANSLATE: Let's go, then let's go!
TRANSLATE: I've beaten you once before, I remember it like yesterday.
TRANSLATE: I thought it was over, that you wouldn't come back here,
TRANSLATE: so I tasted victory.
TRANSLATE: My eyes shone with the whole world,
TRANSLATE: and you came back again and said: once more.
TRANSLATE: Third round of the fight, you put me back at the start.
TRANSLATE: But you forgot that I won't give up just like that.
TRANSLATE: Though this road is hard and sometimes I feel weak.
TRANSLATE: I often see my mom wiping away her tears.
TRANSLATE: I love you!
TRANSLATE: Still here! Thought you had me?
TRANSLATE: Still here! We're laughing in your face.
TRANSLATE: Still here and I'm not going anywhere.
TRANSLATE: Still here! Maja, give it to this monster!
TRANSLATE: This is your last step, I'll prove it to you,
TRANSLATE: listen up, cancer, because your days are numbered.
TRANSLATE: You attack children – that is a true disgrace.
TRANSLATE: You steal our dreams and our childhood fantasies.
TRANSLATE: Every time I fall, it teaches me to move forward.
TRANSLATE: The scars on my body are badges of many roads.
TRANSLATE: Did you think you'd break me, that you'd take away my days?
TRANSLATE: Unfortunately you were wrong – get out, I'll close the door!
TRANSLATE: Still here! Thought you had me?
TRANSLATE: Still here! We're laughing in your face.
TRANSLATE: Still here and I'm not going anywhere.
TRANSLATE: Still here! Maja, give it to this monster!
TRANSLATE: You latched onto little Maja,
TRANSLATE: feeding off other people's dreams.
TRANSLATE: Pardon my language,
TRANSLATE: but I think it's been a while since anyone put you in your place.
TRANSLATE: We'll go for mani-pedi with Maja,
TRANSLATE: our fans will be right there with us when
TRANSLATE: we're always dancing and always laughing,
TRANSLATE: right after we absolutely destroy you.
TRANSLATE: You took my dad, then you took my grandpa,
TRANSLATE: you wanted to take my mom, but she wouldn't let you!
TRANSLATE: This verse writes me a better tomorrow,
TRANSLATE: because even when you win, heaven gains an angel.
TRANSLATE: This is for everyone on the wards, where everyone fights
TRANSLATE: like soldiers from the special forces.
TRANSLATE: Nurses, doctors – men and women – and parents:
TRANSLATE: we won't lose this fight! Maja!
TRANSLATE: Still here!
TRANSLATE: Still here!
TRANSLATE: Still here!
TRANSLATE: Still here!
